context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the extract-engine instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the task is to move existing code out of a Rails app and into an engine.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Prefer incremental extraction over big-bang rewrites. Preserve behavior first, then improve design.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **DO NOT extract and change behavior in the same step.** Extraction must preserve existing behavior; refactoring and improvements belong in a separate step after the move is complete and verified.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Each slice must have: one coherent responsibility, minimal new public API, passing regression tests, and a clear next step.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify regression coverage still passes before proceeding to the next slice:
